reasoning: The stock dropped 7% to $219.84 on Friday, March 13, 2026, hitting a 52-week low due to a voluntary medical device correction. This suggests the market heavily overreacted, bleeding over $800 million in market cap. Such deep, sudden gaps down on limited-impact news often undergo short-term mean reversions (a "bounce") the following week. However, since weekly stock moves are highly noisy and momentum remains downward, I am keeping my estimate fairly close to 0.50, conservatively forecasting a 58% chance of closing higher next week.
